packageRules.description: Catalog app upstream container images (src/<app>/src/compose.yaml). One PR per app, never auto-merged — a human must also bump the Hola bundle version and review the upgrade/backup manifest metadata.
prBodyNotes: ⚠️ This bumps the **upstream image** (tag + digest) only. Before merging, also bump the **Hola bundle version** (`src/<app>/package.json` + `src/<app>/src/manifest.json` — Hola's semver describes impact on the *Hola user*, not upstream's number) and review whether the manifest's `upgrade`/`backup` blocks need changes. CI regenerates `catalog.json` on merge.

packageRules.description: Immich's Postgres image is coupled to the immich-server version: its tag encodes the PG major AND the exact VectorChord/pgvecto.rs extension versions, and Immich pins one specific image per server release in their own docker-compose.yml. It must change ONLY in lockstep with an immich-server bump (matching Immich's official compose), never independently — a decoupled PG-major bump diverges from Immich's tested config and needs a manual data migration Immich doesn't support. Newer tags (e.g. 16-*) exist on GHCR but Immich ships 14-* across v2.7.5 (stable) and v3.0.0-rc, so Renovate should not propose them. When bumping immich-server, update this image to whatever that release's compose pins.
